item.title: 50/30/20 Budget Spreadsheet
item.description: Apply the 50/30/20 budgeting rule with this Excel and Google Sheets template. Automatically allocates income to needs, wants, and savings.

item.title: Debt Payoff Calculator Spreadsheet
item.description: Create a debt payoff plan with snowball or avalanche methods. This Excel and Google Sheets template shows your payoff date and interest savings.

item.title: Freelancer Expense Tracker Spreadsheet
item.description: Track business expenses for tax deductions with this freelancer-focused Excel and Google Sheets template. Categorized for Schedule C reporting.

item.title: Investment Portfolio Tracker Spreadsheet
item.description: Track stocks, ETFs, and other investments with this Excel and Google Sheets template. Monitor performance, allocation, and gains in one place.

item.title: Monthly Budget Planner Spreadsheet
item.description: Track income and expenses with this easy-to-use monthly budget template for Excel and Google Sheets. Automatic calculations and visual charts included.

item.title: Net Worth Tracker Spreadsheet
item.description: Track your net worth over time with this Excel and Google Sheets template. Log assets, liabilities, and see your financial progress.

item.title: Savings Goal Tracker Spreadsheet
item.description: Track multiple savings goals with this visual Excel and Google Sheets template. See your progress and stay motivated to reach your targets.

item.title: Side Hustle Income Tracker Spreadsheet
item.description: Track income from multiple side hustles and gigs with this Excel and Google Sheets template. See earnings by source and month.

item.title: Subscription Tracker Spreadsheet
item.description: Track all your subscriptions and recurring bills in one place. See monthly and annual costs with this Excel and Google Sheets template.

item.title: Terms of Service
item.description: Terms of service for FinanceCraftedSheets digital products.

item.title: Travel Budget Planner Spreadsheet
item.description: Plan and track your travel expenses with this comprehensive Excel and Google Sheets template. Covers flights, hotels, activities, and daily spending.

item.title: Ultimate Finance Bundle - All Templates
item.description: Get all 11 finance spreadsheets in one bundle at 60% off. Budget templates, debt payoff, investment tracking, and more for Excel and Google Sheets.

item.title: Wedding Budget Spreadsheet
item.description: Plan your wedding without overspending. This Excel and Google Sheets template tracks every expense from venue to honeymoon.

item.title: About FinanceCraftedSheets
item.description: Professional Excel and Google Sheets templates for personal finance, budgeting, and financial planning.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Get in touch with FinanceCraftedSheets for questions about our Excel and Google Sheets templates.
